druckenmiller.headline: I don't see a fat pitch — limited data with elevated VIX suggests caution until liquidity picture clarifies.
druckenmiller.brief: Missing Fed data, employment, inflation — can't see the picture. VIX at 29 says something's wrong. Raise cash, wait for clarity. No fat pitches when you're trading blind.

aschenbrenner.headline: Give me a ticker and I'll tell you if it's solving tomorrow's bottleneck or yesterday's consensus trade
